dict.string: StudyTrace needs camera access to capture photos for survey responses.
StudyTrace may access your calendar to collect scheduling context for research studies you join when calendar data collection is enabled.
StudyTrace may access your contacts to collect contact-related research data for studies you join when contact data collection is enabled.
StudyTrace uses Screen Time permission so you can choose the specific apps whose usage should be monitored for the study.
StudyTrace may read your Health data to collect health and activity measures for research studies you join when Health data sharing is enabled.
StudyTrace may write study-generated health measurements to the Health app only when a research study you join requires it and you grant permission.
For collecting your activity, this application needs to access your location data.
For collecting your activity, this application needs to access your location data.
For collecting your activity, this application needs to access your location data.
StudyTrace may access motion and fitness data to measure physical activity for research studies you join when motion data collection is enabled.
StudyTrace needs photo library access so you can attach images to survey responses.
StudyTrace may use Bluetooth to detect nearby devices or study sensors for research studies you join when Bluetooth data collection is enabled.
